title: 20241022Wet 87574L
summary:
Main
• VLCC Market Strengthens as Geopolitical Tensions Rise and Winter Demand Looms - The third week of October closed with signs of firmer market sentiment for VLCC owners in both the East and West regions, as geopolitical tensions in the Middle East persisted despite oil prices edging lower. Earlier in the month, geopolitical unrest had shifted the market dynamics , leading many shipowners to hesitate in offering cargoes, which reduced tonnage availability and pushed up spot rates. Middle East to China rates are now showing a stronger outlook for the rest of October, climbing ~5% above the previous month's levels, despite a continued influx of modern tonnage.
